subcodes.title: Words spoken in Dec. 1912 in London
subcodes.first_line: In the first chapter of the Gospel of St. John the opening words are as follows… Christ is the Word. Now what may this mean?
subcodes.subjects: @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @Christ; Christianity
